# satus

> A CLI that reads your Postgres schema and writes realistic, relationally-coherent seed data that respects every foreign key, constraint, and business rule. Postgres only. CLI only.

satus is distributed as the npm package `@passkeybridge/satus` (binary: `satus`). It introspects your live Postgres schema, builds a dependency DAG from foreign keys, and emits inserts that load on the first try. Three built-in domain profiles (medical, e-commerce, SaaS) shape values so demo and QA data looks like a real business instead of `John Doe` and `Lorem Ipsum Corp`.

## Canonical commands

```bash
# Install
npm install -g @passkeybridge/satus

# One-time setup in a project (writes ./satus/config.yml)
satus init

# Inspect the plan without writing data (DAG, row counts, profile binding)
satus plan --schema public --profile medical

# Generate and load seed data
satus generate --schema public --profile medical --rows 1000

# Required environment
# Required environment
export DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@host:5432/db

# LLM provider (pick one; set both and pass --provider, or set the
# provider field in satus.config.json to disambiguate).
export OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
```

Exit codes: `0` success, `10` schema unreachable, `11` target schema not empty, `20` LLM rate-limited, `21` LLM auth, `30` profile not found. Full reference: https://satus.sh/cli.

## Pages

- [Overview](/): What satus is, how the pipeline works, and what it deliberately will not do.
- [Quickstart](/quickstart): Install the CLI and generate your first seed file in under five minutes.
- [Docs](/docs): Full reference for configuration, profiles, and run modes.
- [GitHub Action](/docs/github-action): passkeybridge/satus-action@v1 — composite action for PR-preview databases.
- [CLI reference](/cli): Every flag, subcommand, and exit code.
- [Profiles](/profiles): The three built-in domain profiles and what each one generates.
- [Recipes](/recipes): Common patterns: PR preview environments, CI fixtures, screenshot data.
- [Compare](/compare): satus vs faker, vs hand-written fixtures, vs database snapshots.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free CLI tier and paid license tiers.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on Postgres seed data, schema-aware testing, and related topics.

## Optional

- [Security](/security): Vulnerability disclosure policy and supported versions.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
